title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Jayabheri Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Jayabheri Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Real Estate Agent to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
